\n
\n

The subscription will auto renewal until cancelled by the customer.

\n

The customer should either take a back up of data by themselves or should request for a data archive from Docully.

\n

Data / Data Room once deleted, cannot be reinstated under any circumstances.

\n

The Data / Data Room will be qued for deletion at the end of their cancellation date and shall be available for 15 days for any re-instation requests.

\n

If the customer doesnt want to auto renew, the customer should click on Cancel Now or Cancel on expiry date to put an end date to their active subscription.

\n

The customer shall modify package if they anticipate a higher data storage on their subscription. If the plan is not modified, the data additional data storage fee of $50 per GB per month will be charged to the customer until the additional storage is removed from the data room before the expiry of current billing month.
